feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Circular Table Join between KNA1 & KNVP
entry.content:
Hello, I am trying to use SQVI to build a table join and am struggling with one part of it. 

I would like to be able to use the company code and partner function in KNVP as selection criteria to find a list of customers with their name and address (I can easily add ADRC to the table join to get detailed address details if required) and who is the sales person responsible for that customer (KUNN2 in KNVP). 

When I build the link of KNA1 to KNVP using KUNNR, it gives me the customer name and address details (even if I have to add ADRC it's easy). Problem is that now I end up with a "customer number" for my sales person responsible in KUNN2. 

I need now to run the circular reference to again look up KUNN2 = KUNNR in KNA1 to get his name vs just his SAP Customer Number. I dont know how to run this circular lookup. Does anyone else have any clue how to do this?

entry.title: Hierarchy upload from S/4 publich cloud to BW4H
entry.content:
Hi experts

We are using CDS view IFIGLACCOUNTHN, GL Accounts Hierarchy Nodes, to upload hierarchies from S4H Cloud.

We are using a customer InfoObject BGGLACC instead of 0GL_Account. The field routine has been defined as follows:

   IF source_fields_3 = '0HIER_NODE'.
      result = '0HIER_NODE'.
    ELSE.
      result = 'BGGLACC'.
    ENDIF.

While loading data into BW we get this error:

The text information for hierarchy nodes are mantained in the source system.

Where is the error?

Many Thanks!

entry.title: S4Hana VS SAP R3
entry.content:
Hi Master,

Can you compare for S4Hana & SAP R3?

Plus & Minus

 

 

RISE with SAP 

SAP Fiori 

SAP Community

entry.title: SAP CAP CDS Distinct does not return distinct values
entry.content:
I am currently trying to implement a distinct entity projection based on one of my tables. The table in the data base is pretty simple and holds onto users in differnt sap onprem systems: 

entity SAPUsers: cuid {
 userId: String; 
userName: String; 
email: String;
}

In my CAP project I want to provide a search field so an enduser can search across all our SAP Landscape for one user. The user simply has to type in the search field the users username, id oder email and the SAP User will be shown in the field. 

Unfortunately across our Landscape, the username and email is not always the same (but the ID is always the same). So it can happen that one user has multiple entries in the table but the same user id. 

To make my search field a little bit more beautiful I would like to show the distinct user IDs based on the first entry that is found. 

Therefore I implemented a projection looking like the following

    entity DistinctUsers              as
        select from SAPUsers distinct{
            key userId,
            email,
            userName
        };

Since I did not find any documentation about the cds distinct keyword in the SAP CAP docu expect the following question: Question Distinct my assumption was that the distinct would be based on the id field, since this is the key for this projection. 

Unfortunately when I create the distinction like that, users that have different email or username will be shown multiple times. I also cannot leave out the email or username in the distinct entity since I need those in the search field. I also tried out to put the distinct next to the select and create a SQL like querry, but none of it worked. 

Therefore I am a little stuck on how to create a distinct entity based on the ID field but also have access to the email and userName.

entry.title: BUSINESS PLACE IN SD DOCUMENT
entry.content:
Hello all,

We are currently using for regulatory purposes the business place for India company code. We need to be able to have the business place on billing document in sap public cloud, we have updated the mapping "Assign Business Places to Sales Offices". However, the business place is not being picked up on our line item. 

Cany anyone please guide me on how we can put the business place on billing document for India.

Thank you

entry.title: I can't create billing document
entry.content:
I was trying to create a billing document in the S4 HANA Public starter system, and after pressing the save button, the following error message appeared.

Could you please advise me on how to resolve this issue?

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: How to display invalid entry message in calculation view input paramter
entry.content:
Hi all,

We need to implement a feature that displays an “invalid entry” message when a user inputs invalid data into the input parameter of a calculation view created in Business application studio. Despite extensive research, I have not found any viable solutions. Could someone please advise if there is an available option to achieve this?

Thanks in advance!

Chethan

entry.title: How to rectify the decimal variations of GRN in sap
entry.content:
I have posted the GRN of PO qty 0.7 with 3 different GRNs qty of 0.02, 0.28, 0.4. 
Part price is 3763.77.
PO value is 2634.65.
Next we have posted the LIV, At that time we found the price difference of 2634.64.
Price diff. of 0.01
So Kindly share your valuable solution of this issue.

entry.title: Accessing HANA/ECC without BAPIs and Gateway?
entry.content:
Is there a way to access information in HANA and ABAP ECC databases using CDS RESTful services without BAPIs and Gateway? I'm aware of the npm package 'node-rfc', but it's no longer maintained.
Despite researching CDS, Cloud Connector, node-rfc, and BAPIs, I'm still unsure of the best method to access my ECC database information.

I have limited knowledge of the SAP ecosystem. Could someone guide me on current best practices or alternatives for this scenario? Any links, documentation, or tutorials are welcome. Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: call SAP hana cloud API(Get/Post) from our dot net application(.net)
entry.content:
Hi,

We required to call SAP hana cloud API(Get/Post) from our dot net application.

Our application will connect to various SAP hana cloud customers via API.

Customers would authenticate our call via basic authentication/Oauth2/certificate based on requirement of Hana API.

Please help us to with necessary steps to call API of SAP S/4 HANA public cloud. We are totally new to SAP so we need some expert guidance to proceed further.

 

Thanks

entry.title: 'Automatic GR' from SFC complete in Order POD is not updated to ERP(hana cloud)
entry.content:
Dear,

This question is regarding to an issue in SAP Digital Manufacturing(DM) which has been integrated with HANA Cloud ERP.

Before begin, we can see a SAP Help document that says, 'Automatic GR' is proceeded when a SFC is completed; and I have experimented it works.

https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/creating-goods-receipt?locale=en-US

The problem was appeared when I monitored Integration Message Dashboard app in DM. There were not any rows about Auto GR. It means Auto GR was not being updated to ERP. Of course, other GR Postings, which are manually posted in Order POD or Posting Report POD, are appeared well in the dashboard.

Is Auto GR only for in DM? If a integrated environment user will complete a SFC, should he manually post GR before complete? If the problem is not solved, when missing positing GR before complete, we have to post adding GR quantity at least 1 to Automatically generated quantity(same to ordered qty); that might be a wrong qty.

I am afraid that my knowledge and insights are not enough, that is why I am writing this question.

Thank you in advance for sharing your knowledge and advising a solution.

 

Kind regard,

Wonpyo

entry.title: Condition Contract - Multiple Supplier Assignment as Royalty Recipient for same product/services
entry.content:
We are implementing the Condition Contract and Royalty settlement process (55I) in SAP S/4Hana Cloud Public Edition.

Requirement is to assign more then one Royalty Recipient for service/product at the Condition Contract level so that same Royalty Recipient can be assigned at the Sales Contract/Sales Order level for business to run the Royalty Settlement program which will calculate the Royalty for each supplier for the same line item (Material or services). In our case the Royalty can be distributed among more then one supplier/business partner.

Also issue is that we are not able to populate the Royalty Recipient from Condition contract to Sales Order/Sales Contract.

entry.title: EKEYTYPE: The key argument has to be of type `string` or `number`. Found: `undefined` in CAP.
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

GoodDay!

This issue was raised in between the development (when adding attachment feature to my CAP application – used @cap-js/sdm library as mentioned in CAPIRE documentation)

Below is the structure of my header and attachment entity.

InvoiceHeader – Entity

Attachment – Entity

I’ve implemented a custom handler for InvoiceHeader entity on Update event.

I’m running my application in a hybrid mode and I’m opening my annotated UI application (built using FPM). When trying to edit a record and saving it showing me the below error.

             EKEYTYPE: The key argument has to be of type `string` or `number`. Found: `undefined`

When I’m debugging it, the error was coming from the SELECT statement (which was working previously) line no.103 like in the below screenshot. However the query executed successfully where you can see the result in aHeaders variable.

I’m sure “ID” is the only key for InvoiceHeader Entity and the value is coming via “req.data.ID” parameter.

I’m trying to figure it out, I’m not sure where I’m lagging.

Help me to resolve this issue.

Thanks in Advance!!

Best Regards

Boopalan M

SAP Business Application Studio , SAP Cloud Application Programming Model ,

SAP HANA Cloud , SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database

entry.title: Add a copy email when a PRItem is release to email group
entry.content:
Hello
I am hoping you can help me, I am new to SAP S4 but have worked on "other" packages, we have SAP Private cloud editions
I am configuring a Flexible Workflow for PRItem release.

When the workflow has completed I want to send an email notification to the team that convert a PR to A PO.
I can not see how to add this in the maintain workflow, flexible workflow scenario editor, nor in Email Templates, how is this achieved please?

entry.title: Does SAP HANA trial supports trigger
entry.content:
hello, I'm currenting testing a SAP HANA trial instance. 

I always get strange syntax error when I execute SQL to create trigger on my table. 

Could you confirm if trigger is supported in the trial version? If not, is there a way for me to test this in the trial version?

Here are my testing queries:

 


-- Step 1: Create a Table to Track Changes
CREATE TABLE CUSTOMER (
CUSTOMER_ID INT PRIMARY KEY,
CUSTOMER_NAME VARCHAR(100),
CUSTOMER_ADDRESS VARCHAR(255)
);

-- Step 2: Create a Change Tracking Table (Audit Table)
CREATE TABLE CUSTOMER_CHANGE_LOG (
LOG_ID INTEGER GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY,
CUSTOMER_ID INT,
CHANGE_TYPE VARCHAR(10), -- Values: 'INSERT', 'UPDATE', 'DELETE'
OLD_CUSTOMER_NAME VARCHAR(100),
NEW_CUSTOMER_NAME VARCHAR(100),
OLD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESS VARCHAR(255),
NEW_CUSTOMER_ADDRESS VARCHAR(255),
CHANGE_TIMESTAMP TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Step 3: Create Triggers for INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE
-- Trigger to Capture INSERT Operations
CREATE TRIGGER CUSTOMER_AFTER_INSERT
AFTER INSERT ON CUSTOMER
FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
INSERT INTO CUSTOMER_CHANGE_LOG (CUSTOMER_ID, CHANGE_TYPE, NEW_CUSTOMER_NAME, NEW_CUSTOMER_ADDRESS)
VALUES (new.CUSTOMER_ID, 'INSERT', new.CUSTOMER_NAME, new.CUSTOMER_ADDRESS);
END;

entry.title: Mass upload of consumption data history for multiple materials
entry.content:
Hello,

To initiate a forecast, we currently navigate to Material Change App > Forecast View > Consumption. However, we need a way to upload consumption data for multiple materials in bulk, rather than manually entering consumption data for each period through the Material Change App. Is there a way to achieve this in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

entry.title: Multiple Email notifications
entry.content:
I have a sap ariba account with email notifications enabled. Recently I have been facing an issue with the number of emails received. The same email is being sent to my account multiple times within the same minute.
It's not an email delivery issue, and it only occurs with my user (admin account) - the other users set to receive email notifications do not have this issue.

entry.title: SAC/SAP S4/HANA EXCEL EXPORT AND IMPORT
entry.content:
Hi team,

I am having an issue of toughts because it was given to me a database on SAP S4/HANA to export data to an excel and then import to SAC, but all the data is accumulated and they asked me to present by each month and year. First i tried to export each month by itself, but when i get to February the data of that month comes with january too, so that outcome its not possible, so i tried to add and Calculated measure, the idea was "if the date was = to 202402 the measure on the excel of february would subtract to the measure of the excel file of january so i only had the numbers of february, but i tried everything and i couldnt reach an out come by using all the commands of SAC.

If anyone could help me i would eternly gratefull.

Have a blessing day

PS: I will leave here an print of the excel. This excel doesnt have an date registered on it, i know the month because o filter them in SAP before i export.

 

Bernardo Santos

entry.title: Empties Management Issue
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

We have an urgent client requirement in our empties management module(in SD-MM module)

Point no 1: Empties Balance Standard Report

Point no 2: Empties Security & Deposits process steps

Example for point no 1: Customer sends 100 Qty goods & they return 80 Qty material so my empties balance has to be shown as 20 qty in a standard report, Please let me know if there is any standard report or T-code which can show me the empties balance.

Example for point no 2: Please let me know how deposit or security process is operated in empties management.

 

Thanks & Regards

Sony 

(SD Consultant)

entry.title: Serial number prefix in MM
entry.content:
Hi Members 

I have the challenge that I need to add a prefix to my serial numbers, when I create a new purchase order, so far I have created a new category and a number range.  

I also created a serial number profile in MM and maintained my prefix, the issue is, that when I create a new PO in ME21N, the correct number range are picked but without prefix, it is important that the supplier got the information about the prefix, so how to show the serial number incl. prefix in ME21N and the output form?

Any ideas?
